name: tokhub
review_cadence: before external distribution and after TokHub API permission changes
output_contract: Execute TokHub operations through the logged-in user's website-equivalent permissions, return redacted results, and block guarded operations without explicit execution metadata.
rollback_boundary: Remove agent-skills/tokhub and skills/tokhub; restore tokhub-admin from previous package if needed. No database or server migration is involved.
